response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior individual contributor with nearly two decades of polyglot engineering experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators, testing workshops). However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of formal technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of ever managing people, running performance cycles, or owning a team roadmap. His mobile experience is dated and app-level rather than platform-ecosystem-level. He fits a senior/staff IC track, not this management opening.
strengths: Authentic developer-tools and testing-infrastructure background: open-source test runner (Trial), assertion library (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD and GitLab infrastructure, MCP code generators
18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency systems
Demonstrated teaching and mentoring inclination via workshops, Selenium courses, code katas, and conference talks
concerns: No people-management experience: no direct reports, hiring, performance feedback, or one-on-one responsibilities anywhere in the career history
No formal technical-leadership role meeting the 3-year requirement; titles are consistently senior/staff IC positions
Mobile experience is limited to maintaining iOS/Apple TV apps in 2015-2016, well short of the mobile-platform-ecosystem knowledge the role emphasizes
